1. `(>= (+ (x boat) (y boat)) (d p0))`  => `x + y >= -370`
2. `(>= (- (y boat) (x boat)) (d p0))`  => `y - x >= -370`
3. `(<= (+ (x boat) (y boat)) (+ (d p0) 25))` => `x + y <= -370 + 25 = -345`
4. `(<= (- (y boat) (x boat)) (+ (d p0) 25))` => `y - x <= -345`
